---
title: 'Tutorials'
subtitle: 'Data analysis and visualization tutorials and tips.'
# css: '../../src/styles/projects.css'
include-after-body: '../../src/scripts/responsive-tag-bar.html'
toc: false
sidebar: false
number-sections: false
back-to-top-navigation: false

listing:
  id: tutorials-listing
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort: "order asc"
  fields: [title, description, categories, author, date]
  grid-columns: 1
  image-height: "0px"
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 20
---
